summary: Phase 2 Batch 2 backend testing. 19/20 tests passed. All 5 new endpoints functional: weekly-review (with caching), deload/check, warmup/today, plan/auto-adjust, plan/autoregulate (reduce/increase/maintain logic). All 4 regression endpoints still working. One minor bug: AI-generated weekly review stored with empty highlights[] when no training sessions completed — fallback guard not applied to AI result before persisting.

minor.issue: AI-generated review can store empty highlights[] (when user has 0 sessions completed). Fallback safeguard `highlights or ['Complete more sessions...']` is only applied in _fallback_review(), not to AI result before DB storage. Cached result returns highlights=[].

action_items: Fix weekly-review: after AI generation, apply `review_data['highlights'] = review_data.get('highlights') or ['Complete more sessions to unlock insights']` before persisting to db.weekly_reviews
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2650 lines — should be split into routers/services for maintainability
Weekly review AI result stored without validating empty highlights — minor UX issue when user has 0 sessions
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests used existing user_a@theprogram.app data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Batch 2 all 5 endpoints working. Weekly review caching verified. Autoregulate reduce/increase/maintain logic all correct. Deload scoring saves to db.deload_history. Warmup returns tailored steps with readiness + injury adaptation. Regression endpoints all pass.
rca_of_issue: Empty highlights bug: In server.py get_weekly_review(), after AI response is parsed, the code does NOT apply the same `highlights or [default]` guard that _fallback_review() does. When AI decides no highlights are warranted (0 sessions), it returns highlights=[] which is stored as-is. Fix: add `review_data['highlights'] = review_data.get('highlights') or ['Complete more sessions to unlock insights']` after AI JSON parse, before DB insert.
